title: CO-PAY RELIEF DIVISION - 211info
text: PATIENT ADVOCATE FOUNDATION CO-PAY RELIEF DIVISION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides direct payment for co-pays, co-insurance, and deductibles for patients who need financial assistance. 421 Butler Farm Road Hampton, VA 23666 Eligibility: Insured individuals with prescription coverage and income below 500% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL). Hours: Monday-Friday 5:30am-2pm Email - (866) 512-3861 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Co-Pay Relief Division (866) 512-3861 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Health Insurance Premium Assistance Prescription Expense Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PATIENT ADVOCATE FOUNDATION
